vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1721

plan.title: feat(ts-migration): port vBRIEF implementation-intent preflight to TS (Wave 2)

narratives.Description: Port the evaluate() contract of scripts/preflight_implementation.py into @deftai/core: a vBRIEF is eligible only when it lives in vbrief/active/ and plan.status equals running. The TypeScript port preserves the exit-0-only-when-active-and-running behavior and golden-diffs against the Python oracle; the session-ritual wrapper is deferred to a follow-up per the approved design.
narratives.Overview:
## Parent

#1530 (Part 1 of 2; umbrella epic #1545)

## What to build

Port the vBRIEF implementation-intent gate (`scripts/preflight_implementation.py`) to TS, preserving the exit-0-only-when-active-and-running contract and the install-layout resolution.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `vbrief:preflight` runs on TS with the active+running contract preserved
- [ ] Golden-output parity vs the Python oracle (cache-off)
- [ ] `task check` passes

## Standing invariants (all Part-1 children)
- The Python suite is the **parity oracle** and runs **wholesale** (not affected-sliced) until deleted.
- `task check` stays green at every step (strangler-fig; no big-bang).
- The parity gate runs **cache-off** so a golden diff is never served from cache.
- No Python module is deleted until its TS replacement covers historical bug fixtures (not just happy-path) and CI usage.
- No agent-runtime dependency (that is Part 2, #1707); no monorepo orchestrator on day one (Nx never; Turborepo only on a measured trigger).

## Type

AFK

## Blocked by

- Blocked by #1718
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Port the folder and plan.status evaluator from scripts/preflight_implementation.py into packages/core/src/preflight/ with the same reject messages and actionable activate redirect.
- Add packages/cli/src/vbrief-preflight.ts plus a parity harness and vitest fixtures that verify the active+running contract against the Python oracle with cache off.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft orchestrator, I want the vBRIEF implementation-intent gate ported to TypeScript, so that dispatch eligibility is enforced without the Python runtime.

items.title: vbrief:preflight on TypeScript returns exit 0 only when the

narrative.Acceptance: vbrief:preflight on TypeScript returns exit 0 only when the vBRIEF is in active/ and plan.status equals running.
vbrief:preflight rejects pending, proposed, malformed-JSON, and wrong-status vBRIEFs and emits the actionable activate redirect message.

items.title: The parity harness emits identical findings and exit codes t

narrative.Acceptance: The parity harness emits identical findings and exit codes to the Python oracle across active, pending, and malformed fixtures with cache off.

references.title: Issue #1721: feat(ts-migration): port vBRIEF implementation-intent preflight to TS (Wave 2)

expected_outputs: vbrief-preflight-parity exits 0 with identical findings/exit codes versus the Python oracle (cache off)
vitest coverage >=85% across packages/core/src/preflight and packages/cli/src/vbrief-preflight.ts
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to the Python oracle scripts/preflight_implementation.py via cache-off golden-diff parity fixtures, not a spec section.
